description_long: This is a heavily armored combat vehicle with a low, wide profile and a central rotating turret equipped with a large-caliber cannon. The vehicle features two parallel tracks for mobility, each with visible treads and robust side armor. The turret is octagonal and sits atop the main hull, with a prominent gun barrel extending forward. Distinctive white cross insignias are painted on the upper surfaces of both track housings, and the vehicle's exterior is finished in a dark, matte color. The rear section includes a metal rack or grille, likely for storage or additional equipment. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and urban maneuverability.
description: A dark, heavily armored tracked combat vehicle with a central turret and large forward-facing cannon, featuring white cross insignias and robust side armor.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, armored tracks, central turret with cannon, and white cross insignias on the upper surfaces.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length of the cannon, the octagonal turret, and the rear storage rack.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the turret, track mechanisms, and the metal grille at the rear.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cannon, turret, and side armor with insignia.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large-caliber cannon mounted centrally on the turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with thick, sloped panels covering the hull, turret, and track housings; no modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark color with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White cross insignias on the upper surfaces of both track housings.
